purpose: Continue unattended company1000 processing from the persisted checkpoint: prioritize unresolved and not-yet-touched official recruitment entries, advance the next company audit batch from next_batch_start_index, perform two-pass detail classification, resolve only publicly accessible embedded and HTML job payloads, route official multi-position announcements separately, deduplicate by company_id plus canonical detail URL, detect new/modified/closed/expired records, rebuild CompanySource/JobImport/Coverage/Failures/JobChanges/run_summary, and reassess final acceptance without auto-verifying any job
